Sirentide 🌊

Living, narratable diagrams — baked to static SVG, no runtime JS.

Eleven diagram types · pure-Java bake · inert svg/path/rect/line output · every label a real glyph path · real LaTeX in any label.
Every image below is live renderer output, baked by Sirentide from the DSL beside it.

Piepie legend

Proportional wedges, on-slice contrast labels, an optional left color key.

pie legend
"Reviews" : 40
"Builds" : 25
"Docs" : 20
"Design" : 15

Bars · Lines · Scatterxychart line

One type, three render modes, multi-series with a legend — and a missing value is an honest gap, never a fake bridge.

xychart line legend
series: Revenue, Cost
"Mon" : 5 3
"Tue" : 8 6
"Wed" : 6
"Thu" : 9 4
"Fri" : 12 7

Timelinetimeline

Events placed proportionally in time; ISO dates render as dates.

timeline
"Founded" : 2019-06-01
"Series A" : 2021-03-15
"Launch" : 2024-11-08

Ganttgantt

Min-normalized shared time axis; per-task colors.

gantt
"Design" : 0-3
"Build" : 3-8 #22c55e
"Test" : 7-11
"Ship" : 11-13

Flowchartflowchart

Layered graph, TD or LR — diamond decisions, per-hop edge labels, and a cycle-tolerant layout: the retry loop rides a visible side lane. Node labels auto-contrast with any fill you pick.

flowchart
Start[Commit] --> Test{Tests green?}
Test -->|yes| Ship[Ship it] #22c55e
Test -->|no| Fix[Fix] #ef4444
Fix -->|retry| Test

Sequencesequence

Actors, lifelines, calls (filled heads), replies (open-V), self-message hooks, and activation bars that grow while an actor is busy.

sequence
Client ->> Gateway : GET /token
Gateway ->> Auth : validate
Auth -->> Gateway : ok
Gateway ->> Gateway : sign JWT
Gateway -->> Client : 200 token

Statestate

Mermaid-style lifecycles: [*] start disc and end bullseye, labeled transitions, cycles inherited from the flowchart engine.

state
[*] --> Idle
Idle --> Running : start
Running --> Idle : stop
Running --> [*]

Quadrantquadrant

A 2×2 positioning matrix: axis-end labels, four quadrant labels (Mermaid numbering — Q1 top-right…Q4 bottom-right), and [x,y] points in the unit square. Soft quadrant tints with contrast-derived labels.

quadrant
x-axis "Low Reach" --> "High Reach"
y-axis "Low Impact" --> "High Impact"
quadrant-1 "Major project"
quadrant-2 "Quick win"
quadrant-3 "Deprioritize"
quadrant-4 "Fill-in"
"Feature A" : [0.3, 0.6]
"Feature B" : [0.75, 0.8]
"Feature C" : [0.5, 0.2]
"Feature D" : [0.85, 0.35]

Class diagramclassDiagram

UML classes with stacked attribute + method compartments, grid-placed, wired by all five relationship markers — inheritance (hollow triangle), composition (filled diamond), aggregation (hollow diamond), association (arrow), dependency (dashed).

classDiagram
class Animal {
+String name
+int age
+eat() void
+sleep()
}
class Dog {
+bark() void
}
Animal <|-- Dog : inherits
Animal *-- Collar : composition
Animal o-- Owner : aggregation
Dog --> Bone : association
Dog ..> Vet : dependency

ER diagramerDiagram

Entity tables with typed attributes and PK markers, joined by crow-foot cardinality glyphs — exactly-one (bar), zero-or-many (circle + foot), one-or-many (bar + foot).

erDiagram
CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
CUSTOMER }o--o| ADDRESS : has
CUSTOMER {
string name PK
string email
int age
}
ORDER {
int id PK
date created
}

Display mathmathblock

A standalone full-size equation — the whole body is one LaTeX expression, baked centered to real glyph paths and a fraction-bar <rect>. Paste an equation, get an SVG.

mathblock
\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}

Flowchart — nested subgraphssubgraph

Cluster containers group nodes inside a titled frame; nest them for pipelines within pipelines. The frame border, title tab, and canvas grow-to-fit are all baked.

flowchart TD
A[Start] --> B[Work]
subgraph outer [Build Pipeline]
B --> C[Compile]
subgraph inner [Test Suite]
C --> D[Unit]
D --> F[Integration]
end
F --> G[Package]
end
G --> E[Ship]

Sequence — alt / loop / par framesalt · loop · par

Combined-fragment frames: an alt/else branch, a loop nested inside it, and a par/and across a third actor — each a bordered frame with a label tab and dashed dividers.

sequence
Alice ->> Bob : hello
alt is available
Bob -->> Alice : yes
loop every retry
Alice ->> Bob : ping
end
else is busy
Bob -->> Alice : later
end
par to Bob
Alice ->> Bob : a
and to Carol
Alice ->> Carol : b
end

Math in any label$…$

The moat: real LaTeX inside a diagram label. A $…$ run in any node/edge/message label bakes to STIX glyph paths (not raw source) via an injected math renderer — here $E=mc^2$ and a real fraction $\frac{v^2}{r}$.

flowchart TD
A[Energy $E=mc^2$] --> B[$\frac{v^2}{r}$]

One bake, any theme

The same SVG, twice — no media queries, no second render. Page-background text is currentColor (inherits the theme); labels on filled shapes auto-contrast with the fill; author colors (#hex per node, nodecolor= for all) stay legible anywhere.

flowchart nodecolor=#1e293b
A[Author] --> B{Bake}
B -->|svg| C[Docs] #22c55e
light page
dark page
Clean-room, zero-dependency, Apache-2.0 · sibling of LatteX · gallery of browser-audited renders in examples/gallery
